title: Be Still My Heart: The Bartender's Tale

"'''Be Still My Heart: The Bartender's Tale'''" is a short story about [[Wuher/Legends|Wuher]] by [[David Bischoff]] from ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'', which was published by [[Bantam Spectra]] in [[August]] [[1995]]. It takes place in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

{{Shortstory-stub}}

==Plot summary==
[[Wuher/Legends|Wuher]], a [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-hating [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]], is on his way to work at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]]. He desires to make a [[Alcohol/Legends|drink]] that would please [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. In an alley, he meets a strange droid, [[C2-R4]], who begs for Wuher to save him from the [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]]. Wuher curses the droid and all his kind, then marches off in a fury.

At the cantina that [[Standard day/Legends|day]], [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] is shot and [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Wuher has an enhanced sense of smell, and decides that Greedo would be the perfect ingredient for his special drink. He remembers that the droid he saw earlier is equipped with a special grinder, and races off to find him. When he does, he tells the droid to come with him. He feeds Greedo's corpse to the droid, and adds it to his drink. Jabba loves it, and Wuher has a newfound appreciation for droids.
